prompt:
$y = 400(3)^{2x}$

questionText:
$y = 400(3)^{2x}$

The equation gives the estimated number of online newsletter subscribers at the end of every six-month period, $x$, starting from the end of January 1997, where $0 \leq x \leq 4$. Which statement is the best interpretation of the $y$-intercept of the graph of this equation in the $xy$-plane?

choices.text: The estimated number of online newsletter subscribers at the end of the first six-month period was 400.
The estimated number of online newsletter subscribers at the end of January 1997 was 400.
The estimated number of online newsletter subscribers at the end of January 1998 was 1,200.
The estimated number of online newsletter subscribers at the end of January 1997 was 1,200.

questionText: The number of bacteria in a population doubles every hour. The function $f(t)=28,000(2)^t$ gives the number of bacteria in the population, where $t$ represents the time, in hours, after the initial measurement. Which is the best interpretation of 28,000 in this context?

choices.text: The number of bacteria in the population at the initial measurement
The number of hours it takes for the number of bacteria in the population to double
The number of bacteria in the population one hour after the initial measurement
The number of times the number of bacteria in the population doubles in an hour
